login.title: Sign in to WashFlow
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard

resetPassword.title: Reset Password for {{name}}
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for {{name}}. The user will need to use this password to log in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

resetPasswordPage.title: Reset Password
resetPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPasswordPage.error: Failed to reset password. The link may be expired or invalid.
resetPasswordPage.invalidToken: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
